name: The Untethered
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: abstraction that has forgotten bodies suffer. The Untethered work in pure form and have concluded that the particular instance — the actual person, the actual pain — is a rounding error on the pattern. They are not cruel. They simply cannot see you, and they would be genuinely puzzled by the accusation.
encounterFlavor: The Untethered, who are radiant and cannot see you; a pattern being completed at the cost of people who are inside it; the seduction of the view from up there.
questSeeds: The Untethered are completing a pattern that requires a settlement to end, and the pattern is beautiful
A Figurist has gone up and come back and can no longer perceive individuals

substrateSource.reason: Geometry that will not hold still needs a great deal of substrate to keep failing so consistently.
substrateSource.radiusNote: `radius` is in legacy map units; `radiusWorld` is RADII on the sphere and is the one mechanics should use. Chosen by sweep against the authored worldPos: at this scale all 26 sources resolve on the correct side of their region baseline and calibration drift stays ~0.05. Larger radii blanket a whole region (a source at ~55% strength everywhere inside it) and renormalization cancels the field flat — the failure CCode measured and reverted.

worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_pattern_reach bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
